extension.name: CiviLedger - Financial Audit and Integrity
extension.description: A comprehensive financial audit, integrity checking, and correction tool for CiviCRM. Features: broken chain detection and repair, per-contribution audit trail, account balance dashboard, amount mismatch detection, and FROM/TO account correction with proper reversal entries.
extension.comments: Requires CiviCRM 6.0+. Provides six financial management features not available in CiviCRM core: 1. Integrity Checker - detect broken financial chains 2. Chain Repair Tool - auto-fix missing links 3. Audit Trail UI - per-contribution money flow drill-down 4. Account Balance Dashboard - live balances per financial account 5. Amount Mismatch Detector - flag contribution amount inconsistencies 6. Account Correction Tool - edit FROM/TO accounts with proper reversal
